entity.summary: Fully on-chain decentralized perpetual futures exchange on Aptos with an on-chain order book, clearinghouse, cross-margin trading, and cross-chain USDC deposits.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation describes Decibel as a fully on-chain perpetual futures exchange whose orders are placed, matched, and settled on Aptos, with cross-chain deposits and trader and developer interfaces. Current independently maintained metrics report non-zero perpetual volume, TVL, fees, revenue, and open interest. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: Decibel official documentation overview
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Decibel as a fully on-chain perpetuals exchange on Aptos with an on-chain order book and clearinghouse.

evidence.title: Decibel protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current protocol metrics report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day perpetual volume together with TVL, fees, revenue, and open interest, supporting active classification.
